author: Yungho
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Run persistent AI agents directly in your vault — self-evolving, plain-text knowledge with zero lock-in. Multi-engine via ACP (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and more).

manifest.author: Yungho
manifest.description: Run persistent AI agents directly in your vault — self-evolving, plain-text knowledge with zero lock-in. Multi-engine via ACP (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and more).
manifest.name: NoClaw

name: NoClaw

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

### Code Review & Quality (7-dimension systematic refactor)
- **ESLint 0 warnings**: 21 test mock-type warnings fixed via `vi.mocked()` and explicit typing; 3 file-level eslint-disable directives removed
- **Type safety**: AgentLoop `registerHook` generic type `Parameters<AgentLoopHookMap[K]>[0]` replaces `(payload: unknown)` — root fix for 8 hook callback warnings
- **DRY**: `AppWithSettings` centralized in `shared/obsidian-utils.ts` (adopted by 5 files); `persistAndSave()` deduplicates saveSettings/saveSettingsAndNotify
- **Prettier**: all source files formatted

### UX Fix
- Auto-mention dismiss persists across sends; user must manually re-enable

### Community Plugin Submission Fixes
- README: add markdown `# NoClaw` heading for review bot name matching
- Release assets: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` attached with artifact attestations

### Quality Gate
| Gate | Result |
|------|--------|
| tsc --noEmit | 0 errors |
| ESLint | 0 errors, 0 warnings |
| Prettier | all clean |
| Vitest | 63/65 files, 562/562 passed |
| esbuild | 0 errors |
releases.name: NoClaw v2.4.7
